---
name: app-relationships
description: Use this skill when working with the plss and plss-review apps.
---

# App Relationships Skill

This skill is designed to assist in understanding the relationship between the submission app (plss) and the review app (plss-review).

## Definitions

This skill is intended to be used in a workspace with two folders:

### submission app

This is the application contained in the `plss` folder. It is the app that users use to browse and submit PLSS corner submissions.

### review app

This is the application contained in the `plss-review` folder. It is the app that users use to review and approve PLSS corner submissions.
